---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, incorrect, or unclear documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Issue

**Type:**
- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Incorrect/outdated documentation
- [ ] Unclear/confusing documentation
- [ ] Typo or formatting issue
- [ ] Missing examples
- [ ] API reference issue

**Location:**
<!-- Where is the documentation issue? -->
- File: <!-- e.g., docs/biology/README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md -->
- Section: <!-- e.g., "Installation", "API Reference" -->
- Line numbers (if applicable):

**URL (if applicable):**
<!-- Link to online docs -->

## Current State

**What exists now:**
<!-- Quote or describe current documentation -->

**What's wrong:**
<!-- Explain what's missing, incorrect, or unclear -->

## Proposed Improvement

**Suggested content:**
<!-- What should the documentation say? -->

**Example (if applicable):**
```python
# Provide example code if this would help clarify

```

**Additional context:**
<!-- Any other information that would help improve the docs -->

## Target Audience

**Who needs this documentation:**
- [ ] New users (getting started)
- [ ] Contributors (development)
- [ ] Advanced users (API reference)
- [ ] Scientific users (domain-specific)
- [ ] DevOps/deployment

## Related Documentation

**Related docs to update:**
<!-- Other files that might need updates to stay consistent -->
-
-

**Similar examples elsewhere:**
<!-- Point to good examples in other sections -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have specified the exact location of the issue
- [ ] I have explained what's wrong and what should be there instead
- [ ] I can submit a pull request to fix this (if willing)
